title: elaphrium multijugum
intro: Elaphrium multijugum, also known as the nine-horned burdock, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Elaphrium multijugum are attributed to its ability to relieve symptoms associated with fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, making it a popular remedy for various health concerns. Elaphrium multijugum is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in some herbal supplements.
